extra.info: Eversfield One scene generation workflow using Wan 2.2. Edit the prompt (node 2) for different scenes. Adjust frames in node 3 (81 = ~5s at 16fps). Note: Wan 2.2 node names may vary by plugin version - adjust class_type if needed.
